title: Group by birthday month
excerpt: I’m looking for a way to group employees by their birth month. I’ve tried creating a formula column to extract the month from the birthdate, but I realized that formula columns can’t be grouped. I then added a status col…

posts.author: dlwilson (Darcie Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking for a way to group employees by their birth month. I’ve tried creating a formula column to extract the month from the birthdate, but I realized that formula columns can’t be grouped. I then added a status column with the months listed, hoping to automate the process based on the birthdate or formula column, but I haven’t found an automation that works for either. Does anyone have a solution or workaround for this?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@dlwilson

The kind of logic you need to set the birthday month status is still beyond what is available with base monday.com.

You could do that fairly simply with a “no-code” solution like Make or Zapier.

Jim - The Monday Man
What is Make & How can it help you with monday?
